nodes.name: Slack Notification
nodes.notes: Set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL env var with an Incoming Webhook URL

_readme.title: Weekly Analytics Report via Agent Studio
setup: 1. Set env vars: AGENT_STUDIO_URL, REPORT_AGENT_ID, REPORT_FROM_EMAIL, REPORT_TO_EMAIL, SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL
2. Create credential 'Agent Studio API Key' (httpHeaderAuth): Name=Authorization, Value=Bearer as_YOUR_KEY
3. Configure SMTP credentials for email sending
4. Activate the workflow — it will run every Monday at 8am
5. Use 'Test workflow' to run it immediately for the first time
